name: Merrie Crown Roast of Pork
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees F.
2. Season the pork crown roast with salt and pepper.
3. Place the roast in a large roasting pan, with the rib bones up.
4. Cover the rib bones with aluminum foil to prevent excessive browning.
5. Insert a meat thermometer into the center of the roast, ensuring it does not touch any fat or bone.
6. Roast the pork at 325 degrees F for 2 hours.
7. Prepare the Savory Rice Stuffing (recipe to follow).
8. Fill the center of the roast with stuffing.
9. Continue roasting for an additional 1 1/2-2 hours, until the meat is well done and the thermometer reads between 170 and 180 degrees F.
10. Remove the foil from the rib tips.
11. Place the roast on a serving plate or carving board.
12. Garnish with Lady Apple Fruit Wreath (see previous recipe).
13. For ease in carving, insert a fork into the top of the roast and make slices along the sides of the rib bones.
